narrative:
Claridon Twp. township has 2,060 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
